name: Café Manggha
description: Museum café widely considered the benchmark for Polish museum dining; serves authentic Japanese teishoku-style sets and pan-Asian dishes with a celebrated tea program (gyokuro, hojicha, soba cha, matcha). Breakfast until 12:00; lunch sets (vegan / fish / meat) 12:00–17:30. Wawel view from the terrace.
source: https://manggha.pl/cafe-manggha + reviews on bezfarmazonu.pl and mochiko.pl
price_caveat: Prices partly from 2023–2024 review data — expect 10–25% increases. Verify on-site.
